summary: Frontend testing for Theme Editor click-to-edit and preview sections. All 9 features tested and verified working correctly. Theme editor loads at /theme-editor with all sidebar sections visible, preview iframe shows all expected sections (Announcement bar, Stories, Header & Logo, Category Tabs, Sub Navigation, Hero Banner), and click-to-edit functionality works properly.
critical_code_review_comments: ShopifyStyleEditor.jsx: All 9 sections properly defined in SECTION_LIBRARY
TNVHomePage.jsx: Stories, Category Tabs, Hero Banner wrapped with EditableSection components
TNVStoreLayout.jsx: Announcement bar and Header wrapped with EditableSection components
EditorWrapper.jsx: useEditorMode hook and EditableSection component working correctly
App.js: TNVStoreWrapper shows header on homepage when editor=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme Editor click-to-edit and preview sections testing complete. All features verified working: 1) 9 sidebar sections visible, 2) Preview iframe loads /tnv?editor=true, 3) All preview sections visible (Announcement bar with language toggle/promo carousel/region selector, Header & Logo with TNV logo/search, Stories with 5 avatars, Category Tabs with 5 tabs, Sub Navigation with 8+ items, Hero Banner with Shop Now button), 4) Click-to-edit badge appears on hover, 5) Clicking section in preview expands sidebar settings, 6) Editor Mode Active indicator visible.

preview_iframe.notes: Preview iframe loads storefront with editor=true parameter

elements_found: Promo carousel (Cash On Delivery, Free Delivery)
announcement_bar_preview.notes: All announcement bar elements visible in preview

elements_found: Category tabs (FASHION, Beauty, BAGS & KIDS, HOME & MORE, PREMIUM)
header_logo_preview.notes: Header with logo and navigation visible

stories_section_preview.notes: Stories section with 5 story avatars visible

hero_banner_preview.notes: Hero banner with image and CTA button visible

click_to_edit_badge.notes: Edit badge appears when hovering over sections in preview

click_to_edit_functionality.notes: Clicking a section in preview expands its settings in sidebar

editor_mode_indicator.notes: Editor Mode Active indicator visible in bottom right of preview

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live as per main agent context
